hero.title: Reliable Water Treatment
hero.desc: High-performance filtration systems for residential, commercial and industrial use. Dealer advantages, fast quotations and expert technical support all under one roof.

products.title: Our Products
products.desc: Professional water purification systems for homes, offices and industrial facilities

features.label: Why Euro Fil
features.title: We don't just sell devices
features.desc: From project design to installation, from periodic maintenance to 24/7 technical support — we manage the entire process.

ro.title: Reverse Osmosis & Water Softening Systems
ro.desc: We provide tailored water purification and softening solutions for homes, workplaces, factories, hotels, restaurants and facilities. Thanks to our wide product range, we design systems suited to different use cases and deliver long-lasting, efficient solutions with the right filtration technology.

cert.title: Certified Quality & Trust
cert.desc: Euro Fil products are manufactured to quality standards and delivered with a reliable-use philosophy. With certified product structures, tested system solutions and technical compliance documentation, we provide a service process that gives our customers confidence.

scope.title: Systems Suited to Every Scale
scope.desc: From single-family homes to apartment buildings, restaurants to hotels, and small businesses to production facilities, we offer water filtration solutions tailored to different needs. We identify the right system for every project through correct product selection and technical guidance.

support.title: We're With You After Installation, Too
support.desc: At Euro Fil, the process doesn't end with product delivery. We ensure your system runs efficiently for the long term through the right system selection, professional installation, periodic maintenance and after-sales technical support.

steps.label: Process
steps.title: Getting Started with Euro Fil is Easy
steps.desc: From dealer price quote to uninterrupted support — a professional solution in 4 steps

items.title: Dealer Price Quote
items.desc: Fill out the contact form; our expert team will determine the right system and dealer price quote for your needs.

items.title: System Design
items.desc: Based on your request, a residential RO, water softening or industrial solution proposal is presented within 24 hours.

items.title: Fast Installation
items.desc: Our certified installation team gets to work immediately after the agreement and delivers your system within 24 hours.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.desc: Annual maintenance contracts and 24/7 technical support ensure your system always operates at its best.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Find answers to your questions here.

items.q: How often does a water purification device need maintenance?
items.a: Euro Fil systems require periodic maintenance once a year. Filter replacement times vary between 6-12 months depending on water quality and usage. Customers with maintenance contracts receive reminders.

items.q: How long does installation take and who does it?
items.a: All installations are carried out by Euro Fil's certified technical team. Standard residential systems take 1-2 hours, while industrial systems are completed within 1-3 days depending on the size of the facility.

items.q: Which water sources is it suitable for?
items.a: We have solutions suitable for all types of water sources including municipal water, well water and borehole water. Our expert team identifies the most suitable system for your source and provides a custom dealer price quote.

All Euro Fil products are covered by a 2-year official warranty. Parts and labour costs are covered free of charge for faults occurring within the warranty period. Our 24/7 technical support line is always at your service.

items.q: What do I need to do to get a quote?
items.a: Simply fill out our contact form. A Euro Fil specialist will call you within 24 hours and present a customised dealer price quote. No upfront payment is required.

items.q: Do you have special solutions for industrial facilities?
items.a: Yes. We offer custom engineering solutions for high-capacity facilities such as factories, hotels, hospitals and food businesses. Capacity calculations and system design are provided free of charge.

seo.title: About
seo.description: Euro Fil is an engineering company that designs, manufactures and installs TSE-certified water treatment systems for homes, offices and industrial facilities.

hero.desc: Euro Fil designs, manufactures and installs TSE-certified water purification systems for homes, offices and industrial facilities.

manifesto.quote: Water treatment isn't a product, it's a responsibility. We design every system as if we were installing it in our own home.

items.title: Engineering Precision
items.desc: Every system is custom-designed based on water source analysis; we don't offer off-the-shelf solutions.

items.title: Durable Materials
items.desc: We only use certified components built to withstand pressure and time.

items.title: Transparent Process
items.desc: We share every step of the quote, installation and maintenance process clearly.

items.title: Continuous Support
